channel.title: Roles on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Roles on Make Things Happen

item.title: Simple role management for SailsJS
item.description: You have probably heard this form me. I am working on a Sails js project and I wanted to implement a simple role management. That means that I have several routes like: “/admin”, “/login”, “/users” and I want the admin route  to be accessed only from admins, login to be accessed from admin and users and the users route to be accessed from only the users.
